log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:11+3=14 vs AC 15] MISS.

→ Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: DEX save [d20:6+6=12 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):8+1=9 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):3+1=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Target is flying. Hold Person to paralyze → they fall!
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:17+3=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 7casting_mod force damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 11 WIS save on Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: WIS save [d20:14+2=16 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
